eat_before_boss.title: Eat a full combat meal before a boss fight — use Youkai's Feasts or FD warrior meals for combat buffs

subtitle.text: 143 items. Youkai's Feasts treats food as ritual. The boss fight starts at the cooking fire, not the arena.

description: CH.11 · THE WARRIOR FEAST
▸ Youkai's Feasts adds 143+ food items
themed around Japanese youkai cuisine.
Several of them provide combat-specific buffs
stronger than any vanilla food.
The Warrior Feast scroll covers the full list
and identifies the pre-boss priority items.
◈ YOUKAI'S FEASTS COMBAT PRIORITY
└ The mod's food items cover the five Diet groups
(fruits, grains, proteins, vegetables, sugars)
└ High-saturation meals: hold hunger for full boss fights
without needing to eat mid-combat
└ Stat buffs: specific recipes grant
temporary Strength, Speed, Resistance, or Regeneration
└ Check JEI under youkaisfeasts: for full recipe list
after studying the scroll
└ Cooking station: Youkai cooking vessels + FD surfaces
(compatible with Farm & Charm and Cultural Delights)
◈ PRE-BOSS MEAL PROTOCOL
└ ✦ Ignis fight: fire resistance food + high saturation
Magma Gelatin (Nether's Delight) + warrior rice ball
└ ✦ Monstrosity fight: Resistance buff food + healing
Two golden apples in inventory as emergency backup
└ ✦ Emulator fight: max saturation + Regeneration buff
Full Diet balance before fight for passive recovery
◈ DIET INTEGRATION
└ Diet groups track over time (does NOT reset on death
in standard config — CHECK your pack settings)
└ Actually: Diet DOES reset on death in Sinborn
(configured in diet.toml) — rebuild before every boss
└ Youkai's Feasts covers all five groups if planned
◈ SCROLL: The Warrior Feast
└ Found in Youkai shrine structures,
battlefield loot, high-tier food mod chests
└ Research time: 20 min
└ Unlocks: full Youkai's Feasts combat recipe list,
pre-boss meal planning guide, Diet synergy
▸ The warriors who built the shrine ate before battle.
Not out of tradition.
Out of strategy.
The ritual was the acknowledgment
that preparation ends at the first bite.
▶ Find The Warrior Feast scroll [check]
▶ Eat a full combat meal before a boss fight [check]
◇ Nether's Delight: Magma Gelatin = best fire immunity.
Make a stack before Ignis.
Eat one at the arena entrance.
Your armor does not cover what your stomach can.
